---
title: "NARIT Expedition Report"
---

::: {data-aos="fade-up"}
# 🚀 NARIT Journey: Astro-Tourism

Welcome to our group's trip report. Here, you will find our NARIT documentary and a summary of our activities from an **astro-tourism perspective**.
:::

![](images/clipboard-602656120.jpeg)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🎥 NARIT Documentary

:::::::: {.glass-card data-aos="zoom-in" data-aos-delay="100"}
### "Why Teenagers Should Visit NARIT"

According to the assignment, our vlog focuses on highlighting favorite zones and recommended photo spots for students.

::: {.ratio .ratio-16x9 style="border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(61, 120, 209, 0.5); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);"}
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Ieq6nvAATJg" title="NARIT Documentary" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen>

</iframe>
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 📝 Activity Report

::: {.glass-card data-aos="fade-right"}
### 1. Observation Deck Exploration

We examined the observation platform, focusing on its educational function for ordinary tourists.
:::

::: {.glass-card data-aos="fade-left" data-aos-delay="100"}
### 2. Interactive Astronomy Exhibition

We conducted a simulated experience in the interactive exhibition area and assessed its tourism experience value.
:::

::: {.glass-card data-aos="fade-right" data-aos-delay="200"}
### 3. AstroPark Facilities

As part of "astronomical tourism," we evaluated its supporting facilities。
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {.callout-important data-aos="flip-up"}
## ⚠️ Grading Compliance Check

-   **Photo Content:** Ensure that no photos on this page were taken inside the **Planetarium**.

-   **Image Size:** All images on this page have been compressed to **300-500 KB** to comply with hosting limits.

-   **Documentary Theme:** The documentary needs to answer the question, "Why should students come to NARIT at least once?"
:::
::::::::
